prompt_replacements.old: List all completed in-person sale records from March 2026.
prompt_replacements.new: List all sales from March 2026, including deleted sales.

prompt_replacements.old: Each membership test asks one predicate about one candidate property. Create separate EXPLICIT_USER_CONSTRAINT tests for different properties, even when they consume the same input; omit predicates already enforced by answer_expression.
prompt_replacements.new: Each membership test is one atomic predicate over a candidate. qualification.any_of is OR; each all_of item is AND. Reference test IDs to express the complete qualifying population.

prompt_replacements.old:
Within answer_population, question inputs are predicate operands, not separate tests; the number of inputs does not determine the number of tests.
Within answer_population, when multiple inputs are alternative values for the same predicate, create one membership test for that predicate.
Multiple MUST_PASS tests mean the candidate must satisfy every test. Create separate MUST_PASS tests only when that conjunction matches the question.
prompt_replacements.new: Question inputs are predicate operands, not separate tests; the number of inputs does not determine the number of tests. Put tests that must all hold in one all_of clause. Put alternative qualifying clauses in any_of. Every membership test must appear in at least one clause.

prompt_replacements.old: For NORMAL_BUSINESS_INSTANCE, include a NORMAL_INSTANCE_GUARD test; the backend attaches the standard ORDINARY_BUSINESS_INSTANCE_V1 profile with typed excluded-state roles.
prompt_replacements.new: For NORMAL_BUSINESS_INSTANCE, use a NORMAL_INSTANCE_GUARD in each qualification clause that relies on the ordinary business population. A clause that explicitly qualifies a normally excluded population uses its explicit predicate instead.

prompt_replacements.old:
After writing answer_population, inspect each EXPLICIT_USER_CONSTRAINT. When the question supplies a concrete value used by that test, declare the smallest copied value phrase as one predicate_value and reference that input from the test. Do not turn the answer subject or counted unit into an input.
A predicate_value does not identify one particular resource.
prompt_replacements.new: Use predicate_value for the concrete value required or excluded by an EXPLICIT_USER_CONSTRAINT. Copy the smallest phrase that supplies that value. Do not turn the answer subject or counted unit into an input.
